entities.name: COCONUT
entities.description: The plant species being studied for genetic diversity and population structure.

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A cost-effective approach for genome-wide discovery of SNP markers and high-throughput genotyping.

entities.name: SINGLE-NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Markers used to assess genetic diversity, population structure, and linkage disequilibrium.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The level of genetic variation within coconut accessions.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The grouping of coconut genotypes into clusters based on genetic similarity.

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci in the coconut genome.

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the informativeness of SNP markers.

entities.name: EXPECTED HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic diversity represented by the He value.

entities.name: UNWEIGHTED NEIGHBOR-JOINING PHYLOGENETIC TREE
entities.description: A method used to group coconut genotypes into clusters.

entities.name: BAYESIAN-BASED MODEL
entities.description: A model used to analyze and group coconut population structure.

entities.name: HEIGHT
entities.description: A physical characteristic (tall or dwarf) used to cluster coconut accessions.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL ORIGINS
entities.description: The diverse global origins from which coconut accessions were sourced.

entities.name: LD DECAY
entities.description: The rate and range over which linkage disequilibrium decreases.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A genomic study approach to link traits to genetic markers for improvement.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A method used to accelerate the efficiency and speed of genetic improvement.

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing coconut traits using genetic diversity and genomic studies.
